title: Senior Software Engineer - Qualcomm India Global Group - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Qualcomm India Global Group - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Software Engineer looking for your next big career move? Qualcomm India Global Group in Kochi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Qualcomm India Global Group:
Qualcomm India Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Qualcomm India Global Group!
